title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Hindustan Unilever Global Group - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Hindustan Unilever Global Group - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at Hindustan Unilever Global Group are looking for an experienced Process Engineer based out of Jodhpur. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Hindustan Unilever Global Group:
Hindustan Unilever Global Group is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Quality Control

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Hindustan Unilever Global Group!
